title: Missing model field and generic description
why_it_matters: Model field absent causes agent to inherit default model. Description is generic without trigger context.
suggested_fix: Add model: sonnet to frontmatter. Update description to include trigger context.

title: Non-standard color field used
why_it_matters: color field is not part of Claude Code agent schema. May be ignored by tooling.
suggested_fix: Remove color: yellow or confirm intentional project extension.
